title: hedyotis subulata
intro: Hedyotis subulata, also known as creeping hediotis or creeping buttonbush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in East Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis subulata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
